pageIntro: Meet the team, support local charities, and see the Ecto in person.
emptyText: No events yet — check back soon!
noUpcomingEventsContactText: Want the team at your next event? Reach out and tell us what you have in mind.
eventCtaText: Interested in having Ghostbusters Virginia appear at your event, convention, or community gathering? We love supporting charitable and community causes across the Commonwealth. Contact us today to learn more.
metaDescription: Upcoming and past Ghostbusters Virginia events across the Commonwealth, including conventions, parades, and charity appearances.
ogDescription: Find where Ghostbusters Virginia will be next and browse our past appearances.
